title: Get rid of your hazardous household waste at these venues in Mossel Bay
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality is hosting its third cycle for the removal of hazardous household waste from 25 to 29 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality is hosting its third cycle for the removal of hazardous household waste from 25 to 29 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Members of the public are urged to make use of this free service and not discard of harmful materials and substances through pouring it down the drain.”","html":"“Members of the public are urged to make use of this free service and not discard of harmful materials and substances through pouring it down the drain.”"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The municipality said it has had numerous operational issues at its regional wastewater treatment works due to contamination caused by used oil and other unknown harmful substances ending up in the sewage system."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Residents can drop off their hazardous waste at the following venues from 08:30-14:00:","html":"Residents can drop off their hazardous waste at the following venues from 08:30-14:00:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"25 September: Dana Bay Hall26 September: Mossel Bay Town Hall29 September: Great Brak Municipal offices","html":"25 September: Dana Bay Hall
26 September: Mossel Bay Town Hall
29 September: Great Brak Municipal offices"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These items can be dropped off:","html":"These items can be dropped off:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Motor oil, oil filters, brake fluid• Used antifreeze• Paint, paint thinner, turpentine• Pesticides or herbicides• Househould batteries• CRTs, old television sets, miscellaneous electronics• Tyres• Fluorescent tubes and globes• Household medical waste (needles and old medicine and tablets)","html":"• Motor oil, oil filters, brake fluid
• Used antifreeze
• Paint, paint thinner, turpentine
• Pesticides or herbicides
• Househould batteries
• CRTs, old television sets, miscellaneous electronics
• Tyres
• Fluorescent tubes and globes
• Household medical waste (needles and old medicine and tablets)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The following item will NOT be accepted:","html":"The following item will NOT be accepted:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Explosives• Ammunition• Radioactive materials• Controlled substancesFor any enquiries, contact Waste Management on 044 606 5143.","html":"• Explosives
• Ammunition
• Radioactive materials
• Controlled substances

For any enquiries, contact Waste Management on 044 606 5143."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Get rid of your hazardous household waste at these venues in Mossel Bay
